title: Queen memory v2 behavior lane precheck
delta_summary: keeps colony memory namespace under `colony_memory` with session-id normalization to safe slugs
retains backward-compatible `init_memory_dir(..., migrate_legacy=...)` signature expected by orchestrator/session-manager call sites

risk_signals.evidence: local runtime and tests expect `colony_memory` layout and normalized session ids
risk_signals.impact: upstream replay to `colonies/<raw_id>` can break recall subscription and cross-session path compatibility

risk_signals.evidence: server call sites pass `migrate_legacy=True` during colony memory subscription
risk_signals.impact: dropping compatibility kwarg may raise TypeError on older caller paths

decision_gate: prefer keep_local if compatibility deltas are intentional and targeted queen/session bundles are green
